description.value:
Prerequisite: Int 15. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Hivemind tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Hivemind, you gain +4 bonus to Will saves against mind-affecting effects (resistance).
description.summary: Summon Hivemind tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Hiveminds; +4 bonus to Will saves against mind-affecting effects (resistance) within 50 ft of summon.
